creator: lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.mbr
text:
I found in usergroups page some websites broken of the FUG(FreeBSD Users Group).

- Australia

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: BSD Users Group Sydney (BUGS)
URL: http://www.bugs.au.freebsd.org/

- Europe

Status: [UPDATE]
Reference: BSD User Group Ireland (BUGI)
URL: http://bugi.redbrick.dcu.ie/
Description: The BUGI website has moved to: http://ie.bsd.net/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: IFUG
URL: http://ifug.unixware.ro/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Lund Linux User Group (LFUG)
URL: http://www.pentagon.nu/

- North America

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: BSD Users Group of Orlando (BUGO)
URL: http://bugo.zepa.net/

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: Central California BSD Users Group
URL: http://www.ccbug.org/

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: Free Unix for Indianapolis
URL: http://www.fufin.org/

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: Reno Linux Users Group (RLUG)
URL: http://www.rlug.org/

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: Southern Illinois *BSD Group
URL: http://www.silbsd.org/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: St. Louis BSD User Group (STLBSD)
URL: http://www.stlbsd.org/

Status: [REMOVED MAIN PAGE]
Reference: Rhode Island Free Unix Group
URL: http://users.tmok.com/~rifug/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Unix Users of Deep East Texas
URL: http://uudet.org/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Vancouver BSD Users Group (VanBUG)
URL: http://www.vanbug.com/

- Other Areas

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: FreeBSD User Group Colombia
URL: http://www.bsdcolombia.org/

Status: [REMOVED WEBSITE]
Reference: CafeBUG
URL: http://www.cafebug.org/

Status: [REMOVED MAIN PAGE]
Reference: The New Zealand FreeBSD Users Group
URL: http://www.nzfug.nz.freebsd.org/pub/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Bangalore BSD User Group (BANGBUG)
URL: http://www.bangbug.org/

Thanks! :)
